name: Stuffed Okra
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Fresh okra, washed and dried
2 tbsp Whole coriander seeds, coarsely crushed
1 tbsp Whole cumin seeds, coarsely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the stems off the okra and the very tip at the other end. Slit each pod lengthwise, leaving a 1/4-inch slit uncut at both ends. Be careful not to cut the pods completely in half.
2. Combine the crushed coriander, cumin, and fennel seeds with black pepper, garam masala, cayenne, asafetida, almonds, lemon juice, and 2 tbsp of ghee. Blend well using your fingers if necessary until you have a dry oatmeal-type texture.
3. Using a butter knife, place about 1/4 tsp of the stuffing into each okra pod. Press the edges closed and set aside covered until ready to cook.
4. Place the remaining ghee in a large skillet and heat until hot. Add the stuffed okra pods and spread out in one layer. Keep the heat moderate and cook for 5 minutes, covered. Gently turn the okra to ensure even cooking. Continue cooking for 20 to 25 minutes or until the okra is completely cooked.
5. Place the okra on paper towels and toss with salt. Serve piping hot.
